description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, rectangular layout. The structure features large windows, particularly on the garden-facing side, allowing for ample natural light. A well-maintained green lawn with a swimming pool and lounge chairs is enclosed by a hedge, providing privacy and outdoor leisure space. The exterior is predominantly light gray with some darker accents, and the roof includes visible HVAC units and skylights. The main entrance is set back from the street, with a driveway and a small patio area. The overall design emphasizes open, airy living with a strong connection to the outdoor garden.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a private garden, and a swimming pool, featuring a light gray exterior and open, airy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the garden with a pool, and the hedge enclosure.
description_view_1: Garden-facing view highlighting the lawn, pool, lounge chairs, and large windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hedge-enclosed garden, pool, and the long, windowed facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, roof details, and the hedge boundary of the garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows facing the garden
